# anysearch Search API Provider Matrix

Providers: 16. Unified parameters and response fields supported via anysearch.

## Brave
- Docs: https://api-dashboard.search.brave.com/app/documentation/web-search/get-started
- Env: BRAVE_API_KEY, BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY
- Domain filters: none
- Country: full
- Language: full
- Date range: full
- Safe search: full
- Mode: none
- Answer: none
- Full text: none
- Summary: none
- Highlights: full
- News: full

## DuckDuckGo
- Docs: https://pypi.org/project/ddgs/
- Env: (none — keyless)
- Domain filters: none
- Country: full
- Language: none
- Date range: none
- Safe search: full
- Mode: none
- Answer: none
- Full text: none
- Summary: none
- Highlights: none
- News: none

## Exa
- Docs: https://docs.exa.ai/reference/search
- Env: EXA_API_KEY
- Domain filters: full
- Country: full
- Language: none
- Date range: full
- Safe search: full
- Mode: full
- Answer: none
- Full text: full
- Summary: full
- Highlights: full
- News: full

## Firecrawl
- Docs: https://docs.firecrawl.dev/features/search
- Env: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY
- Domain filters: none
- Country: full
- Language: none
- Date range: none
- Safe search: none
- Mode: none
- Answer: none
- Full text: full
- Summary: none
- Highlights: none
- News: full
